overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long FUTU Daily ETF (FUTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU) stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective FUTG was launched on Oct 14, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
